name: Scar /Fallout OC/
description: Self proclaimed engineer, in reality just a conman, if not manipulating people for his benefit, then by using his lockpick skills. Homeless, wandering from place to place, yet always found in the bar of the chipped tooth in the town in the middle of the wasteland, Ashen. To be rather a disliked character, hes very recongizable with his bold tophat, waving it liek an idiot. I hate him
